div1.entryFree: Transformation, change of appearance, meta morphosis: Wint. IV, 4, 31. H4A I, 1, 44. H4B II, 2, 194. Tim. IV, 3, 349. Hml. II, 2, 5. == the shape to which one is changed: how my t. hath been washed and cudgelled, Wiv. IV, 5, 98. the goodly t. of Jupiter there, his brother, the bull, Troil. V, 1, 59.
